contentPattern.structure: full-bleed static cover image + overlaid orange frieze insert band (title + description) with decorative corner ornaments

suitableFor: static poster/cover hero sections with a title and short description overlaid in a brand-colored frieze insert band
brand-story or landing lead sections that use the frieze design language without any video
notSuitableFor: full-bleed autoplay background video hero (use hero-video-cover)
plain background-image hero with no frieze band (use vanilla hero)
